## Checks

- [ ] `npm run audit:public`
- [ ] `npm run ci:backend`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Docker build checked, if Docker-related

## Public Repo Hygiene

- [ ] No `.env*`, `.vercel`, key, or certificate files are included
- [ ] Docs/examples use placeholder values only
- [ ] Any new backend env vars are documented in `*.env.example`
